---
title: "Comprehensive<br>PhD documentation<br>with R and Quarto"
author:
  - name: "**Tina Rozsos**"
    orcid: 0009-0008-5383-5497

institute: "Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam"
date: "2026"
date-format: "[use**R!**] YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, style.scss]
    footer: "tinarozsos.github.io/user2026 | github.com/tinarozsos/phd-template"
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    controls: true
    embed-resources: true
    standalone: true
    center: false
    slide-number: false
    overview: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: img/index.png
    data-background-opacity: "0.6"
    data-footer: false
callout-icon: false
callout-appearance: simple
---


## Why?

- PhD: complex, long-term project
- Need a structured framework to manage information
- R: fun; Quarto: pretty

## How?

- lightweight Quarto website template:
    - timeline, meeting notes, paper ideas, and more
- pre-filled page & markdown chunk generation with custom R functions
- reference management with BibTeX
- compile locally or deploy online (e.g. GitHub Pages)

## {background-iframe="https://tinarozsos.github.io/phd-template/" visibility="uncounted"}

## Make it your own!

. . .

::: {.callout-warning}
### Template at [github.com/tinarozsos/phd-template](https://github.com/tinarozsos/phd-template)
:::
<hr class="green">

. . .

::: {.callout-tip}
### Customize it -- every person & project is different
:::
<hr class="blue">

. . .

::: {.callout-note}
### Descriptive, not prescriptive
:::
<hr class="purple">

<!-- ::: {.incremental}
1. Template at [github.com/tinarozsos/phd-template](https://github.com/tinarozsos/phd-template)
2. Customize it -- every person & project is different
3. Descriptive, not prescriptive
::: -->

## Thank you!

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="75%"}

<p style="margin-bottom:1em;">Find me online:</p>

[{{< iconify mynaui:globe >}} tinarozsos.github.io](https://tinarozsos.github.io){.red}

[{{< iconify simple-icons:github >}} github.com/tinarozsos](https://github.com/tinarozsos){.yellow}

[{{< iconify simple-icons:bluesky >}} @tinarozsos](https://bsky.app/profile/tinarozsos.bsky.social){.green}

[{{< iconify mdi:linkedin >}} linkedin.com/in/tina-rozsos/](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tina-rozsos/){.blue}

[{{< iconify mdi:email >}} t.d.rozsos@vu.nl](mailto:t.d.rozsos@vu.nl){.purple}

:::
::: {.column width="25%"}

![](img/profile.jpg)

:::
:::
